# Termite Control

termite control

![Termite Control Treatment Specialists in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Interior-Bathroom-scaled-e1747162320401.jpg)

#### termite control

# Termite Control Services

Termites are silent destroyers, capable of causing costly damage to your home or property before you notice a single sign of their presence. At [Dang Pest Control](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/), we specialize in eliminating and preventing termite infestations to protect your home and give you peace of mind. Serving Tyler, TX, and the surrounding areas, give us a call at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) today and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

## Identifying If Termites Are Present

Not yet sure if termites are present at your property? We can perform a [thorough termite inspection](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/termite-inspections/) conducted by our highly trained technicians. We identify the species of termites—whether it’s subterranean or drywood—and their colonies, so we can tailor the most effective treatment options for your situation.

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## Our Termite Control Process

## Step 1

## Identification

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img1.png)

A full evaluation of your home, both interior and exterior, to identify signs of termite activity such as mud tubes, discarded wings, or hollow wood.

## Step 2

## Customized Treatment Plans

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img2.png)

Based on our findings, we’ll recommend the best treatment method, including trenching or bait stations for protection and long-lasting results.

## Step 3

## Treatment

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img3.png)

Our expert technicians will implement your customized treatment plan and confirm it was effective.

## Step 4

## Monitoring & Follow-Up

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Control-Process-img4.png)

Ongoing monitoring ensures your home remains termite-free. We stay one step ahead of new infestations.

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

## More About Termites

Termites are social insects that live in colonies. These colonies can grow quickly, causing substantial damage to wood structures, flooring, and even wallpaper. Here are the two most common types of termites in Texas that you should know about:

**Subterranean Termites:** These live underground and typically return to the soil to nest. Their colonies can contain millions of termites and are responsible for the majority of termite-related damage in the U.S.

**Drywood Termites:** These termites live inside the wood they consume. Although their colonies are smaller than subterranean termites, they can still cause significant structural damage over time.

Termites never rest, eating 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Key signs that you may have a termite problem include:

**Mud Tubes:** Thin, tunnel-like structures that termites build to travel from their nests to food sources. These are usually found on walls, wooden beams, or crawl spaces.

**Hollow-Sounding Wood:** When termites consume wood, they leave behind a thin outer layer. Tapping on wood may produce a hollow sound if termites are present.

**Discarded Wings:** Winged termites, also called swarmers, shed their wings as they establish new colonies. Look for wings around windows, doors, or foundation areas.

**Frass:** Termite droppings that resemble wood-colored pellets.

Bubbling Paint or Buckling Wood: Signs of moisture buildup caused by termites or environmental factors.

**Stuck Windows or Doors:** Exposed wood around windows and doors can swell because of termite damage, making them hard to open or close.

While termites can seem overwhelming, controlling them is a task best left to licensed pest control professionals. At Dang Pest Control, we use an Integrated Pest Management (IPM) approach for termite control. This means we don’t just address the problem, but also consider the environmental and structural factors contributing to it.

## Why Choose Us?

When it comes to termite treatment, Dang Pest Control stands out as the trusted choice in East Texas. Here are some top reasons why:

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Proven-Results.png)

### Expertise Backed by Science

Our technicians are trained professionals who use proven, environmentally friendly Integrated Pest Management (IPM) techniques. We are proud members of the National Pest Management Association (NPMA) and the Texas Pest Control Association (TPCA).

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Comprehensive.png)

### Customized Solutions

Not all infestations are the same. We tailor our termite control solutions to fit your property’s unique needs, whether it’s a small home, large business, or under-construction project.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Safety.png)

### Eco-Conscious Treatments

We implement termite treatment plans that not only protect your property, but also minimize environmental impact.

![](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Guarantee.png)

### Local & Reliable

Based in Tyler, TX, we are deeply rooted in the community, serving surrounding areas. Our local presence means faster service and a deep understanding of pest issues unique to East Texas.

## Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I have termites?

Some common signs include mud tubes on walls or foundations, hollow wood, discarded wings (from swarmers), and bubbling or buckling paint. If you see any of these signs, call us immediately for an inspection.

Are your treatments family and pet friendly?

Yes. We prioritize environmentally friendly solutions while effectively eliminating termites.

Can you help with termite prevention?

Absolutely! We offer both pre-construction and post-construction preventive treatments, as well as monitoring systems to protect your investment.

## More Than Termite Treatments

In addition to termites, our [expert pest control services](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/pest-control/) also cover [ants](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/ant-control/), [wasps and hornets](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wasp-hornet-control/), [scorpions](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/scorpion-control/), [rodents](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/rodent-control/), [mosquitos](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/mosquito-control/), [fleas and ticks](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/flea-tick-control/), [cockroaches](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/roach-control/), [bed bugs](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bed-bug-control/), and more.

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)

![Termite Control Services in Tyler TX](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Interior-Attic-Inspectoin-1-scaled-e1747162404673.jpg)

![Cloud Image](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/wp-content/uploads/elementor/thumbs/Longview-r6hksnti0lrmf3nx6tj0qrq8bkbeoqwx1zrzvg77y8.png)

## Protect Your Home Today

Don’t wait until termites cause major damage to your property. Contact Dang Pest Control for professional termite control services tailored to your home or business. Located in Tyler, TX, we proudly serve homeowners and property managers throughout nearby areas,including [Longview](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/longview-tx/), [Jacksonville](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/jacksonville-tx/), [Lindale](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/lindale-tx/), [Bullard](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/bullard-tx/), [Whitehouse](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/whitehouse-tx/), and more.
Call us today at [(903) 871-0550](tel:(903) 871-0550) and [get your quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/).

[(903) 871-0550](tel:(903)%20871-0550)

[Get Your Quote](https://www.dangpestcontrol.com/quote/)
